parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
JOB_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/job_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
missing=""
for f in "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"; do
  if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
    if [ -n "$missing" ]; then missing="$missing, "; fi
    missing="$missing$f"
  fi
done
if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
  echo "{\"status\":\"hard_failure\",\"code\":\"missing_input_schemas\",\"message\":\"Required schema files are missing\",\"missing\":\"$missing\"}"
  exit 1
fi
node -e "const fs=require('fs');JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'));JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[2],'utf8'));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'ok',tenant_schema:process.argv[1],job_schema:process.argv[2]}));" "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const out = $node['Assert Shared Schemas'].json.stdout || '{}'; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(out); } catch (e) { parsed = { status: 'hard_failure', code: 'invalid_schema_files', message: out || 'schema parse failed' }; } return { status: 'hard_failure', reason: 'missing_or_invalid_schemas', code: parsed.code || 'invalid_schema_files', details: parsed }; })() }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
JOB_TYPE="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_type}}"
REQ='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.request_json}}'
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
JOB_ID="mkt_strategy_${TENANT_ID}_$(date +%s)"
OUT_DIR="$ROOT/generated/draft/marketing-jobs"
OUT_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${JOB_ID}.json"
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=process.argv;const tenantId=p[1],jobType=p[2],reqRaw=p[3],now=p[4],jobId=p[5],outPath=p[6],root=p[7];const req=JSON.parse(reqRaw||'{}');const approval=(req.approval&&typeof req.approval==='object')?req.approval:{};const approved=approval.approved===true;const approvedBy=approval.approved_by||null;const approvalNote=approval.note||null;const repairAttempt=Number.isInteger(req.repair_attempt)?req.repair_attempt:1;const maxRepair=Number.isInteger(req.max_repair_attempts)?req.max_repair_attempts:3;const researchPath=(req.research_artifact_path&&String(req.research_artifact_path).trim())?String(req.research_artifact_path):`${root}/generated/draft/${tenantId}/workspaces/research/README.md`;const transitions=[];const updates=[];const push=(from,to,status,message)=>{transitions.push({from_stage:from,to_stage:to,at:now,status,message});updates.push({stage:to,status,message,at:now});};push('received','research_validated','running','Input normalized and strategy workflow started');const researchExists=fs.existsSync(researchPath);const researchContent=researchExists?fs.readFileSync(researchPath,'utf8').trim():'';const researchReady=researchExists&&researchContent.length>0;let routeStatus='awaiting_approval';let state='running';let status='running';let currentStage='awaiting_approval';let reason=null;const approvalCheckpoint={required:true,gate_before_stage:'production_ready',approved,approved_by:approvedBy,note:approvalNote};let boundedRepair={required:false,attempt:repairAttempt,max_attempts:maxRepair,remaining_attempts:Math.max(0,maxRepair-repairAttempt),trigger:null};if(!researchReady){boundedRepair.required=true;boundedRepair.trigger=researchExists?'research_artifact_empty':'research_artifact_missing';if(repairAttempt<maxRepair){routeStatus='needs_repair';state='waiting_repair';status='fail';currentStage='repair_required';reason='research_artifact_not_ready';push('research_validated','repair_required','fail','Research artifact unavailable or empty; bounded repair requested');}else{routeStatus='failed';state='failed';status='error';currentStage='repair_exhausted';reason='repair_limit_reached';push('research_validated','repair_exhausted','error','Bounded repair limit reached; strategy workflow failed');}}else{push('research_validated','strategy_drafted','running','Research artifact located and strategy draft stage completed');if(approved){routeStatus='ready_for_production';state='completed';status='pass';currentStage='production_ready';push('strategy_drafted','approval_granted','pass','Explicit approval received');push('approval_granted','production_ready','pass','Advanced to production-ready stage');}else{routeStatus='awaiting_approval';state='running';status='pending';currentStage='awaiting_approval';push('strategy_drafted','awaiting_approval','pending','Approval checkpoint open; holding before production');}}const doc={schema_name:'job_runtime_state_schema',schema_version:'1.0.0',job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state,status,attempt:repairAttempt,max_attempts:maxRepair,inputs:{request:req,research_artifact_path:researchPath},outputs:{current_stage:currentStage,route_status:routeStatus,approval_checkpoint:approvalCheckpoint,structured_status_updates:updates,stage_transitions:transitions,bounded_repair:boundedRepair,approval_required_before_production:true,production_blocked:!approved},history:[{at:now,state:'queued',status:'pending',note:'marketing strategy workflow accepted job'},{at:now,state,status,note:`route_status=${routeStatus}; stage=${currentStage}`}],created_at:now,updated_at:now};if(reason){doc.last_error={code:routeStatus==='failed'?'repair_limit_reached':'research_artifact_not_ready',message:reason,stage:currentStage,retryable:routeStatus!=='failed'};}fs.writeFileSync(outPath,JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));const response={status:routeStatus,tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,job_state:state,current_stage:currentStage,approval_checkpoint:approvalCheckpoint,structured_status_updates:updates,stage_transitions:transitions,bounded_repair:boundedRepair,job_runtime_path:outPath};if(reason)response.reason=reason;process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(response));" "$TENANT_ID" "$JOB_TYPE" "$REQ" "$NOW" "$JOB_ID" "$OUT_PATH" "$ROOT"
